sqlMap.select: select * from propvalidation where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into propvalidation(propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, name expression event message description executionseq ) values (#propertyno:NUMERIC#, #propertyversionno:NUMERIC#, #metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC#, #name# #expression# #event# #message# #description# #executionseq# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('propvalidation') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select propvalidationno, name, expression, event, message, description, executionseq, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from propvalidation where propvalidationno = #propvalidationno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update propvalidation set
name = #name# name = null expression = #expression# expression = null event = #event# event = null message = #message# message = null description = #description# description = null executionseq = #executionseq# executionseq = null
where propvalidationno = #propvalidationno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from propvalidation where propvalidationno = #propvalidationno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from propvalidation where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select propvalidationno, name, expression, event, message, description, executionseq, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from propvalidation where propvalidationno = #propvalidationno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select propvalidationno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, name, expression, event, message from propvalidation where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
